name: Tiramisu 6
recipeInstructions:
To make the cake, beat the eggs and sugar until thick and lemon-colored. Gradually mix in the flour by hand. Spread the batter on a 20x20-cm baking tray and bake at 400°C (200°F) for 3 to 5 minutes. Remove from the tray and cut into three pieces, each measuring 18/12 cm.
For the filling:
60 g egg yolks
50 g sugar
1 tsp vanilla extract
20 g Tia Maria
2 leaves gelatin (about 2 teaspoons)
250 g mascarpone cheese
125 g whipped cream
To make the topping:
120 g espresso coffee
80 g sugar
2 tsp amaretto
100 g whipped cream
- cocoa powder (optional)
Assemble: Spread two slices of sponge cake with filling and stack. Top with the remaining layer of cake, then spoon the topping mixture over everything. Sprinkle with powdered cocoa if desired and serve cut into squares.
